title: Data Sources
subtitle: Where does the data come from?

items.name: IMF PortWatch
items.detail: Daily chokepoint transit counts via ArcGIS REST API. Satellite AIS-based. Updated once per day.

items.name: AISStream
items.detail: AIS vessel position stream used to estimate inbound and outbound movement over the latest 24 hours.

items.name: MarineTraffic (map)
items.detail: Live AIS vessel map embedded via iframe. Real-time vessel positions.

items.name: EIA (U.S. Energy Information Administration)
items.detail: WTI, Brent, Henry Hub natural gas, and U.S. gasoline price data.

items.name: Yahoo Finance (yfinance)
items.detail: WTI and Brent futures plus major market indicators used as a fallback when spot data is delayed.

items.name: TradingView
items.detail: Real-time price charts embedded via widget (TVC:USOIL, TVC:UKOIL, CAPITALCOM:NATURALGAS).

items.name: Yahoo Finance (yfinance)
items.detail: Snapshots, 5-minute candles, and daily candles for VIX, Nasdaq, S&P 500, KOSPI, KOSDAQ, U.S. index futures, gold futures, the dollar index, gasoline futures, and heating oil futures.

items.name: BBC Middle East RSS
items.detail: Middle East headlines from BBC News.

items.name: Anadolu Agency RSS
items.detail: Regional news from Turkey's state news agency.

items.name: NYT and CNBC RSS
items.detail: English headlines related to the Middle East, energy, and global markets.

items.name: Reuters and AP News (Google News RSS)
items.detail: Relevant headlines from selected outlets through Google News RSS search feeds where official RSS access is limited.

items.name: Yonhap, Korea Economic Daily, Maeil Business RSS
items.detail: Korean international and market headlines classified by keyword.

items.name: Truth Social RSS
items.detail: Trump Truth Social posts collected and translated into Korean.

rows.source: AIS vessel positions and direction estimates

disclaimer: All data is sourced from publicly available APIs and feeds. Hormuz Monitor is not affiliated with any of the data providers listed above.
